title: Carnival
writer: H.C.M. Hardinge, Rosina Henley, Adrian Johnson
actors: Matheson Lang, Ivor Novello, Hilda Bayley
plot: An actor playing Othello in a stage production of Shakespeare's play becomes jealous of his wife's supposed infidelity and seems bound to kill her in the scene in which she, enacting Othello's falsely-accused wife Desdemona, is mu...
